title: Gambling Hell
writer: Maurice Dekobra, Pierre-Gilles Veber, Roger Vitrac
actors: Sessue Hayakawa, Mireille Balin, Henri Guisol
plot: A captain, who has rescued a woman from danger,sails with her to Macao to do an arms deal with the Asian proprietor of a gambling den.The proprietor,s daughter, whom a visiting journalist tries to help, doesn,t know the sordid bus...
